guidance_detail: FY27 cc sales +3.5-4.5%, operating income +6-8%, EPS $2.75-2.85; Q2 sales +4-5%, EPS $0.72-0.74 (maintained).
risk_factors: Higher fuel costs ($175M in Q1) pressuring future retail inflation
Consumer pressure (Sam's Club fuel gallons below 10, first time since 2022)
Maximum fair pricing legislation headwind on health & wellness sales
